name: Applications of the L-functions ratios conjectures
title: Applications of the L-functions ratios conjectures
journal: Proceedings of the London Mathematical Society 93 (2007), no. 3, 594–646
abstract: Develops applications of conjectural L-function ratio formulae, including zero statistics and mollified moments.
findings: The manifest marks the ratios-conjecture/mollified-moment route as unsuitable for an unconditional H15 proof; retained as a documented comparison source.
